title: Senior AI Scientist / Engineer — Gartner
subtitle: Agentic AI for client-call intelligence at Gartner scale — with a focus on evaluations, quality and reliable agent systems.

projects.name: Call Insights at Scale
projects.html: agentic Graph-RAG over a purpose-built Gartner knowledge graph that turns 30–50K sales/service calls a month (6K–100K+ tokens each) into self-serve, hierarchy-aware insight — top objections, win/loss, renewal-vs-growth, disengagement reasons, sentiment and peer-connection discovery, visible from associate to executive. By moving all reasoning onto the graph and limiting the agent to one Cypher query + a summary: tokens −85% (200–400K → <60K), latency −65% (~150s → ~50s), failure surface 25 steps → 2.

projects.name: Local embedding migration
projects.html: replaced OpenAI embeddings with Harrier-OSS run locally on vLLM for call-transcript embedding: $0 API cost, ~50–60% faster, with tighter, better-calibrated similarity scores.

projects.name: Agent performance engineering
projects.html: TOON + Markdown I/O (−22% latency, −35% tokens), prompt caching, autocompaction, a model router, and DSPy for model-invariant instructions.

stack: Stack: LangGraph 1.0 · Neo4j · Anthropic · vLLM · DSPy

title: Senior Scientist, AI — Eli Lilly
subtitle: Built agentic AI tooling for Finance and data-science teams at Tech@Lilly.

projects.name: CFO Notes
projects.html: multi-agent RAG that ingests diverse internal documents to produce financial variance reports across 20 products / 18 markets, cutting prep 1 day → 15 min; became the flagship decision-support tool for Lilly USA Finance.

projects.name: ARTIE
projects.html: composed CFO Notes, Nexify and VizSnap into modular agentic blocks (router, SQL, validator, reviewer), scaling 300 → 900+ users across the enterprise.

projects.name: VizSnap
projects.html: MCP-based agentic visualization generating dynamic ECharts dashboards from natural language; 900+ users, 10K+ queries/mo; fine-tuned Qwen-VL via RL.

projects.name: Nexify
projects.html: async agentic pipelines (human-in-the-loop, time-travel, subagents) cutting question-to-insight from weeks → minutes, with LangSmith eval suites.

stack: Stack: LangGraph · FastAPI · MCP · LangSmith · Qwen-VL

title: Senior Data Scientist — Citigroup (Business Analyst → Data Scientist → Sr. DS)
subtitle: ML, forecasting and risk across Citi's AI & analytics (AIM) group — progressing from Business Analyst to Senior Data Scientist.

projects.name: First-party fraud detection
projects.html: anomaly-detection system flagging fraudulent activity, saving ~$6.6M/yr.

projects.name: Call-volume forecasting
projects.html: hierarchical time-series + Transformer ensembles for global call-center capacity planning, 81% → 91.8%.

projects.name: Deposit-rate prediction
projects.html: RF + Transformer ensemble setting optimal rates for 2,500+ clients, error down to 11 bps.

title: MSc Economics — Gokhale Institute, Pune
subtitle: Batch prize for top scores in Econometrics, Business Analytics & Linear Economics. Research on AI's impact on labour, UBI modelling, female labour-force participation.

title: BSc Economics & Statistics — NMIMS, Mumbai
subtitle: Best Paper Presentation (modeling India's low female labour-force participation) · Budding Economist award.
